title: eva fantasy
wikitext:
[]: eva fantasy             Quote Post by iloveallecchianime » Sat May 05, 2007 9:53 pm whats your fantasy about being in the anime? (ive gone crazy wanting to have the eva gang as my friends).... I loved the fan fics "body heat" and "water hazard"....I would like to have a job in nerv and be the weapons director (whatever thats called) and show Asuka and them to shoot correctly...mabey even show Asuka to shoot MY gun hehehehehe.....i know Shinji would be too scared to shoot a gun so he would bother our SESSION

[]:             Quote Post by Zkh » Sat May 05, 2007 10:23 pm If I posted them I'd need to go to more therapy.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat May 05, 2007 11:01 pm To be the guy that beats the unholy shit out of Gendo Ikari . . .

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 05, 2007 11:36 pm DatDude wrote: To be the guy that beats the unholy shit out of Gendo Ikari . . .

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sat May 05, 2007 11:41 pm To be able to watch Third Impact from a hillside and laugh at it all.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat May 05, 2007 11:52 pm Reichu wrote: DatDude wrote: To be the guy that beats the unholy shit out of Gendo Ikari . . .

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 05, 2007 11:56 pm DatDude wrote: Me: "No now bite the fucking cerb, you fucking user."

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun May 06, 2007 12:02 am Reichu wrote: DatDude wrote: Me: "No now bite the fucking cerb, you fucking user."

[]: Re: eva fantasy             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun May 06, 2007 7:05 am iloveallecchianime wrote: i know Shinji would be too scared to shoot a gun so he would bother our SESSION

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun May 06, 2007 8:52 am You guys make me feel sorry for the Commander. Anyway, my thoughts on this topic are well-known already.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sun May 06, 2007 11:36 am Yes, I'd beat up/Kill Gendou.... preferabley with an Ak-101.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun May 06, 2007 12:22 pm I'd be the guy who comes in during EoE's hospital scene to fix the broken lock on room 303's door. Then submit the security camera recording to Japan's Funniest Medicinally-Induced Comas Caught on Tape.

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Sun May 06, 2007 12:38 pm I'd love to hang around with Rei and be able to pilot an Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by sensei_juice » Sun May 06, 2007 1:02 pm I have no desire to be in the world of NGE - it would be too unreal, too creepy, and I would be stuck knowing that we all get screwed when 3I happens. If I ended up as somebody in NGE, though, I would be a grade above Shinji and crew, sitting in the back of the classroom reading books and thinking, "Wow, the grade below us is really weird." IRL, the grade below me is really weird. I hope they don't blow up the world.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun May 06, 2007 5:50 pm Should be obvious if you know me, but... Give A/S a step in the right direction after Asuka returns from the LCL Sea! ^__^ In general helping them with their problems would be interesting, provided *I* wouldn't go nuts trying to help *them*, lol. Plus being able to ride in Yui-sama (yup, she's my favorite Eva) just once would be cool. @ Reichu:

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun May 06, 2007 5:53 pm sensei_juice wrote: I have no desire to be in the world of NGE - it would be too unreal, too creepy, and I would be stuck knowing that we all get screwed when 3I happens.

[]:             Quote Post by Zkh » Sun May 06, 2007 6:52 pm Actually if I was in the show I would beat the hell out of EVERY character, even Yui for causing all that shit and every un-detailed background character in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun May 06, 2007 7:45 pm Zkh wrote: Actually if I was in the show I would beat the hell out of EVERY character, even Yui for causing all that shit and every un-detailed background character in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Sun May 06, 2007 8:53 pm Id pick the kids up from school and have them call me "uncle kyle" Wooo id get a kick outta that.Yeah......uncle mutha fu@#ing kyle.... *drifts into thought* Shinji-"Asuka,uncle kyle's here to take us to nerv!" Asuka-"Gott in himmel,again?Why can't Kaji pick us up insted?" Shinji "Come on Asuka,he's a nice guy" Asuka-"Nice guy huh?If he's so nice then why is it that all he talks about is damn guns?" Me-*honks horn*"Hey hurry up!Misato's gonna blow my head of with that sweet sweet USP of hers if we are late!!" Asuka-"See what I mean!?!"
